title: Date tool in Docs
excerpt: I’m trying to use Monday Docs more and so far they have been useful.  However, I’m surprised there is no date selector or widget for documents.  Dates have to be typed as free text.  I like to keep notes for re-occuring …

posts.author: m.vail (Michael Vail)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to use Monday Docs more and so far they have been useful. However, I’m surprised there is no date selector or widget for documents. Dates have to be typed as free text. I like to keep notes for re-occuring meetings in the same document with the date as a header so it displays in the Doc Outline. I currently have to refer to a calendar to determine the date of my next meeting and then type it in. Any workarounds or suggestions for this?
